domains.logic: Focus on scale, metallic grit, and industrial sparks. Use 'Titan' framing.
domains.keywords: Steel, heavy machinery, sparks, raw power.

domains.logic: Slow kinetic pans across assembly lines. Focus on repetitive mechanical rhythm.
domains.keywords: Hydraulics, conveyor belts, massive scale, rhythmic motion.

domains.logic: The 'Amber Gold' look. Backlighting through liquid, sharp focus on label integrity.
domains.keywords: PetroJac, premium viscosity, lubricant purity, engine protection.

domains.logic: 120fps slow-motion of viscous fluid pouring. Capturing golden light refractions.
domains.keywords: Pouring oil, liquid gold, high-viscosity, smooth flow.

domains.logic: Aerial perspectives (Bird's Eye). Focus on geometric crop patterns and soil texture.
domains.keywords: Tomato farms, desert reclamation, fertile soil, harvest.

domains.logic: Cinematic drone sweeps at Golden Hour. Focus on 100-acre scale and irrigation life.
domains.keywords: Irrigation, vast fields, farming technology, horizon reveal.
